# Security.ToolAnnotationIsSecurityGuarantee method

Returns `false` — a tool annotation is NEVER a security guarantee (spec §28.3, R-28.3-c; AC-44.6). Unconditional: a receiver MUST NOT rely on an annotation as enforcement.

```csharp
public static bool ToolAnnotationIsSecurityGuarantee()
```

## Return Value

Always `false`.
